final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: social-media-cover
Asset type: vertical short-video cover, 9:16 mobile-first
Primary request: bold typography-driven cover for gaming monitor launch announcement
Scene/backdrop: clean gradient background with subtle tech texture, minimal negative space
Subject: large prominent headline "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as focal point, secondary tagline "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩"
Style/medium: minimalist graphic design, premium tech aesthetic, sans-serif typography
Composition/framing: rule of thirds grid layout, headline placed at upper third intersection, product visual implied through typography hierarchy
Lighting/mood: soft even lighting, premium and sophisticated atmosphere
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal base + electric blue or cyan accent + crisp white text
Materials/textures: matte surface, subtle brushed metal or glass texture, clean edges
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz", "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩"
Constraints: large eye-catching headline must dominate, maintain minimalist high-end feel, vertical format optimized for mobile thumb-stopping
Avoid: cluttered layout, multiple competing fonts, gradient overload, stock photo clichés, watermark
